title: schoenus octandrus
intro: Schoenus octandrus, also known as the cumbungi or common cumbungi, is a type of sedge plant native to Australia and New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which are believed to aid in the treatment of various health issues. The health benefits associated with Schoenus octandrus include reduced inflammation, improved wound healing, and potential antimicrobial properties. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and salves, although its use should be approached with caution due to the potential risks and unknowns surrounding its efficacy.
